content:
✨ New players can post here for help~
✨ Veteran players can also post strategy posts and early game suggestions for novice players to help new players get started with the game~

🎁We will give mysterious rewards to the keepers who are enthusiastic about helping new players~
@everyone

Almost everyday, someone asks "Is this character good?"  or "What team can I create?" Here is a guide to creating your first team.

***Very First Team Formula***
By following this starting formula for awakers (units in game) you will create a reasonable starting team

**Damage Type   |   Defense Type   |   Healer   |   (Anything you want)**

*Just note, it's not often easy to tell what units are good at healing.*

If you play the campaign, you'll unlock *Ramona (Assist Type)* and *Doll (Assist Type - Healer)*. Both of these are in the starting colour yellow or Chaos realm. Yellow characters can easily fit into most teams in the late game.  So now you'll have to pick two other units (awakers).

To do that go to **Interlude** then **Awaker Trial**. In the awaker trial you'll get to try out both unit mechanics and faction (realm) mechanics. Try them out and see what you like. **A nice tip is you can click  on the bar** (blue, red or purple) and it does something. Example using a Blue (aequor) team  and clicking the blue bar you can change the tentacle stance. 

Ultimately you'll want to make a main team for the campaign. You'll play with this team a lot so it's good to have one
 unit on your main team that you really love.
thread_title: How To Create a Team + Other Information
